codeReview.summary: The fix cleanly resolves the prior blocking issue: chat multimodal image-part builders now use a chat-only detail enum restricted to `auto`, `low`, and `high`, while Responses image inputs retain the broader `ImageDetail` contract with `original`. I found no remaining blocking or non-blocking issues in the combined original-plus-fix implementation within this reviewed scope.

summary: Pass: I reviewed the prior failed multimodal feature, the fix handoff/transcript, and commits `8941ac5b019f414aad2bb62fc47958c97b40c8a6` plus `7118772baec9c4ad51700c9e6bd81be8ff58cb6f`. The original over-broad chat image-detail typing is fixed at `src/resources/multimodal.rs:16`, `src/resources/multimodal.rs:181`, and `src/resources/multimodal.rs:197`, and the regression at `tests/multimodal_request_contract.rs:123` confirms Responses still serialize `detail="original"` while chat builders cannot represent that unsupported value.
